title: cystopteris regia f. latiloba
intro: Cystopteris regia f. latiloba, also known as the Royal Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Cystopteridaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cystopteris regia f. latiloba include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, teas, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
